title: Featured Reads Production Strengthening
purpose: Strengthen Featured Reads production governance by carrying forward AG24 scoring, metadata, source/reference and quality audit controls without generating articles, publishing, deploying or activating backend systems.

strengthening_principles.title: Consume AG24 source chain
strengthening_principles.rule: AG25 must use AG24Z closure, AG24B scoring, AG24F metadata and AG24I audit controls as source-of-truth.

strengthening_principles.title: Two-reference discipline
strengthening_principles.rule: Each future Featured Read should target two verified references or be clearly marked under editorial verification.

strengthening_principles.title: No random or fake references
strengthening_principles.rule: Broken, parked, spam-like, unrelated or invented links must not be treated as verified references.

strengthening_principles.title: Image credit required
strengthening_principles.rule: Future article images must carry image credit/attribution or editorial-verification status.

strengthening_principles.title: Object and layout guard
strengthening_principles.rule: Images, tables, figures, graphs and infographics must preserve readability, article width and mobile layout.

strengthening_principles.title: Cost-first production
strengthening_principles.rule: Candidate scoring and editorial planning should occur before expensive generation, image creation or API-backed workflows.

strengthening_principles.title: Non-activation
strengthening_principles.rule: AG25 is planning/strengthening only and must not publish, deploy, mutate public pages or activate backend systems.

supabase_reminder: Hybrid staged path remains selected: static/GitHub-controlled go-live first; Supabase/Auth/backend later only after explicit review and approval.
